title: Where did Nerv get its Adam DNA in the first place
display_title: Where did Nerv get its Adam DNA in the first place
wikitext:
[]: Where did Nerv get its Adam DNA in the first place?             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Wed Mar 10, 2010 8:05 pm We know for a fact that every Eva except for Unit 01 was cloned from the DNA of Adam, however we have no idea where they got it from. Correct me if I'm wrong but the fetus of Adam was only found recently by Kaji. The Evas were made long before the Adam fetus was every discovered. So the question is, where in the world did Nerv get all this DNA? They must have been receiving in from Seele. Here are the few possibilities No 1: Seele collected DNA during their experiments on Adam and thus sent it over to Nerv. Seele must have had some in their pockets before 2I. Otherwise, I don't see how their records and DNA would survive that massive explosion. No 2: Seele took Kaworu's DNA and sent it to Nerv to make the Evas. Any thoughts?

[]: Re: Where did Nerv get its Adam DNA in the first place?             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Mar 10, 2010 8:12 pm mabey chunks of adam flew everywhere when he blew up and they recovered a few before recovering the embryo.

[]:             Quote Post by Halicat » Wed Mar 10, 2010 8:12 pm They must have gotten it from Adam herself whilst in embryonic form, so I'd say from Seele themselves. I have a hunch this is probably why they had so many failed Eva prototypes, before the unit 00 we all know came along. If Angels are genetically similar to us in their arrangement of matter, perhaps they used 'stem cells' from Adam for the cloning? Oh and forgot to mention, Misato says they had to reduce Adam to embryonic form during second impact to minimise damage, I'm sure they had her long before Kaji got a hold of her.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Mar 10, 2010 8:19 pm good point halicat!

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Mar 10, 2010 8:45 pm Any Adam materials Nerv had most likely originally came from Adam itself, having been extracted by the Katsuragi expedition. Gendou probably stole away with a few samples when he fled Antarctica shortly before Second Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Mar 10, 2010 9:31 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Any Adam materials Nerv had most likely originally came from Adam itself, having been extracted by the Katsuragi expedition. Gendou probably stole away with a few samples when he fled Antarctica shortly before Second Impact.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Wed Mar 10, 2010 9:57 pm I'm surprised that some survived after the Second Impact to get the DNA.

[]:             Quote Post by Agent_Koopa » Wed Mar 10, 2010 10:04 pm Perhaps the embryo is the most central part of Adam? You can clone from Adam's discarded flesh, but to pull off Third Impact, you need Adam's body itself?

[]: Re: Where did Nerv get its Adam DNA in the first place?             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 10, 2010 11:04 pm Grimmjow wrote: Correct me if I'm wrong but the fetus of Adam was only found recently by Kaji. The Evas were made long before the Adam fetus was every discovered.

[]: Re: Where did Nerv get its Adam DNA in the first place?             Quote Post by Allemann » Thu Mar 11, 2010 2:33 am Reichu wrote: Tabris.

[]: Re: Where did Nerv get its Adam DNA in the first place?             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Mar 11, 2010 2:43 am Allemann wrote: Where is Tabris?

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Thu Mar 11, 2010 12:32 pm Fair enough. I've always wondered how Kaji managed to smuggle Adam out. Surely Seele would have had Adam under the tightest security. But I assume it makes more sense if you think that Seele knew they needed more than the fetus to bring about 3I. It did not provide enough(yes I know this sounds cheesy) "Adam energy." The only thing it could do was bring about a private instrumentality if someone fused themselves with the fetus(Gendo's attempt)

Article: Where did Nerv get its Adam DNA in the first place
 enough. I've always wondered how Kaji managed to smuggle Adam out. Surely Seele would have had Adam under the tightest security. But I assume it makes more sense if you think that Seele knew they needed more than the fetus to bring about 3I. It did not provide enough(yes I know this sounds cheesy) "Adam energy." The only thing it could do was bring about a private instrumentality if someone fused themselves with the fetus(Gendo's attempt)
